description: Implement Wallet, Profile, Groups, Notifications features and the complete Admin Dashboard
steps: Create lib/features/wallet/data/models/wallet_model.dart - Freezed model for wallets table (balance, bonus, winnings)
Create lib/features/wallet/data/models/transaction_model.dart - Freezed model for transactions
Create lib/features/wallet/data/models/payment_method_model.dart - Freezed model for payment_methods
Create lib/features/wallet/data/repositories/wallet_repository.dart - get wallet, transactions, deposit, withdraw, add/remove payment methods
Create lib/features/wallet/domain/providers/wallet_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for wallet state, transactions list
Create lib/features/wallet/presentation/screens/wallet_screen.dart - modern wallet UI with balance card (shows balance, bonus, winnings), quick actions
Create lib/features/wallet/presentation/screens/deposit_screen.dart - deposit flow with amount input, payment method selection
Create lib/features/wallet/presentation/screens/withdrawal_screen.dart - withdrawal flow with amount, payment method
Create lib/features/wallet/presentation/widgets/balance_card.dart - gradient card showing total balance with breakdown
Create lib/features/wallet/presentation/widgets/transaction_tile.dart - transaction list item with icon, amount, date, status
Create lib/features/profile/data/repositories/profile_repository.dart - get/update user profile, get user stats
Create lib/features/profile/domain/providers/profile_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for profile, stats, achievements
Create lib/features/profile/presentation/screens/profile_screen.dart - modern profile with avatar, stats (matches played, contests won, total winnings), rank, wallet summary, history, achievements
Create lib/features/profile/presentation/widgets/stats_card.dart - animated stats display
Create lib/features/profile/presentation/widgets/achievement_badge.dart - achievement/badge widget
Create lib/features/groups/data/models/group_model.dart - Freezed model for groups and group_members
Create lib/features/groups/data/repositories/group_repository.dart - get user groups, create group, join group, get group details with members
Create lib/features/groups/domain/providers/group_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for groups
Create lib/features/groups/presentation/screens/groups_screen.dart - list of user groups with create button
Create lib/features/groups/presentation/screens/group_detail_screen.dart - group chat, leaderboard, members, invite link
Create lib/features/groups/presentation/widgets/group_card.dart - group list item card
Create lib/features/notifications/data/models/notification_model.dart - Freezed model for notifications
Create lib/features/notifications/data/repositories/notification_repository.dart - get notifications, mark read, real-time subscription
Create lib/features/notifications/domain/providers/notification_provider.dart - Riverpod providers with unread count, real-time updates
Create lib/features/notifications/presentation/screens/notifications_screen.dart - notification list with categories, mark all read
Create lib/features/notifications/presentation/widgets/notification_tile.dart - notification item with icon, time, read/unread state
Create lib/features/admin/data/repositories/admin_repository.dart - all admin CRUD: tournaments, matches, teams, players, contests, scoreboard, deposits, withdrawals, users
Create lib/features/admin/domain/providers/admin_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for admin data, analytics
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_dashboard_screen.dart - dashboard with KPIs (total users, revenue, active matches, contests), charts, quick actions
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_users_screen.dart - user management with search, filters
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_tournaments_screen.dart - CRUD tournaments
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_matches_screen.dart - CRUD matches with team selection
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_teams_screen.dart - CRUD teams
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_players_screen.dart - CRUD players with team assignment
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_contests_screen.dart - CRUD contests with match linkage
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_scoreboard_screen.dart - update player scores for live matches
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_wallet_screen.dart - pending deposits approval, withdrawal management
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_reports_screen.dart - revenue, user, tournament metrics with charts
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_settings_screen.dart - app settings, admin management
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/widgets/admin_nav_drawer.dart - navigation drawer for admin sections
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/widgets/kpi_card.dart - KPI metric card with icon, value, trend
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/widgets/admin_data_table.dart - reusable data table with search, sort, pagination
Create lib/features/admin/presentation/widgets/chart_widget.dart - chart widgets using fl_chart for analytics
acceptance_criteria: Wallet screen shows balance card with breakdown, transaction history, deposit/withdraw actions
Profile screen shows user stats, rank, achievements, wallet summary
Groups screen lists user groups, allows creation, shows group details with members
Notifications screen shows categorized notifications with real-time updates
Admin dashboard shows KPIs, charts, quick actions
Admin has CRUD screens for all entities: users, tournaments, matches, teams, players, contests, scoreboard
Admin wallet management shows pending deposits/withdrawals with approve/reject
Admin reports show revenue, user, tournament metrics with charts
All models use Freezed with proper JSON serialization
All screens use Riverpod providers for state management
verification: Verify lib/features/wallet/presentation/screens/wallet_screen.dart has balance card and transaction list
Verify lib/features/admin/presentation/screens/admin_dashboard_screen.dart has KPI cards and navigation to all admin sections
Verify lib/features/admin/data/repositories/admin_repository.dart has CRUD methods for tournaments, matches, teams, players, contests
